author: Marie-Laure Thuret
subject: v4.1.0
body: # [4.1.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.1.0-beta.5...v4.1.0) (2017-08-28) ### Bug Fixes * **Highlighting:** revert breaking change (algolia/react-instantsearch#245) ([453910c](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/453910c)) * **List:** adds support for any type of renderable element (algolia/react-instantsearch#266) ([8faf284](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/8faf284)) * **Pagination:** fixed the offset ([2fde034](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/2fde034)) * **PoweredBy:** aria-* tags are not camelcased (algolia/react-instantsearch#261) ([234b302](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/234b302))
